column1: # Phase 3 — Alt-F3 RUN. Pops up the NAMES list; Enter on a name
# runs the macro stored at that range. This is how the user invokes
# Stash a macro at A1 that types "ran-it" into B2.
# Define an arbitrary name "fancy" over A1.
# Alt-F3 opens the NAMES overlay; Enter on the highlighted name runs
